---
name: Feature Request / Feedback
about: Suggest a change or improvement to TaskMind
labels: enhancement
---

## What do you want?
<!-- Clear description of the desired behavior or change -->

## Why do you want it?
<!-- What problem does it solve? What use case does it address? -->

## Related Feature ID (if applicable)
<!-- e.g., F-02, or "new feature" -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- How will you know when this is done? -->
- [ ] 

## Priority
<!-- How important is this to you? P0 (blocker) / P1 (important) / P2 (nice-to-have) -->
